Records.description: Divergent one-loop box $I_4^D(0,0,0,p_4^2;s_{12},s_{23};0,0,0,0)$ with all massless internal lines and one off-shell external leg. Contains double $1/\varepsilon^2$ poles. Result from Ellis-Ross-Terrano and Bern-Dixon-Kosower.

Massless one-loop four-point function with one off-shell leg $p_4^2 \neq 0$ and three light-like legs. Used as the worked example for the canonical eps-form: starting basis $I = (I_{0011},I_{0101},I_{1010},I_{1111})$, the rescaled basis $I'$ produces a five-letter dlog alphabet $\{x_1, x_1-1, x_2, x_2-1, x_1+x_2-1\}$ and an eps-factorized DE (eq. Aprime_box). Result reinstated as $I_{1111}(\varepsilon,s,t,p_4^2,\mu^2)$ in Sec. solution.
Records.location: Chapter 'Iterated integrals', Sec. 'Differential equations', Example 2, Eq. (chapter_iterated_integrals:example_box, line ~993)

Records.description: One-loop massless scalar box with three light-like legs and one off-shell leg. Explicit $\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^0)$ result via $r_\Gamma/\varepsilon^2$ combinations and finite part $F_1$ in dilogarithms.
Records.familyName: massless 1-loop box with one off-shell leg

Records.description: One-loop four-point box with one off-shell external leg ($p_2^2 = m^2$) in the parametric representation. Second Symanzik $F = \alpha_1 \alpha_3 s + \alpha_2 \alpha_4 t + \alpha_2 \alpha_3 m^2$. Two degree-2 annihilators $A_{2,1}$ and $A_{2,2}$ together with the Euler homogeneity operator generate the D-module of holonomic rank $r=4$, with singular locus $s t m^2 (s-m^2)(t-m^2)(s+t-m^2)$. A factorized fourth-order Picard-Fuchs operator in $d-s$ with a double factor is derived; no explicit MPL evaluation.
Records.location: Section Applications b), around Eqs. for one_mass_box, eq:pf_one_mass_box

Records.description: One-loop scalar box integral I^m(s,t,m) with one external mass (p1^2 = m^2, other legs on-shell massless) and massless internal lines, in d=4-2*eps. Symanzik polynomial F = x1*x3*(-s) + x2*x4*(-t) + x1*x4*(-m^2) (Eq. 4.1). Solved exactly via Feynman parameters as a sum of three 2F1 hypergeometric functions in arguments (s+t-m^2)/t, (s+t-m^2)/s, m^2(s+t-m^2)/(s*t) (Eqs. 4.7-4.9). Reduces to the massless box in the limit m^2 -> 0. Also reproduced via a two-fold Mellin-Barnes representation in Section 5 (Eq. 5.2), with the F_2 Appell function reduced to a single-variable 2F1 via the Bailey identity (Eq. 5.15) and spurious terms cancelling among I^m_1, I^m_{2a}, I^m_{2b} (Eq. 5.20).
Records.location: Section 4, Eq. (4.1); Mellin-Barnes form Section 5, Eq. (5.2)

Results.resultTeX: \frac{2}{\varepsilon^2 s_{12} s_{23}}+\frac{-\log \left(s_{12} M^{-2}\right)-\log \left(s_{23} M^{-2}\right)-\log \left(\frac{s_{23}}{s_{12}}\right)-2 \log (-s_{12})}{\varepsilon s_{12} s_{23}}+\frac{-12 H\left(0,\frac{M^2}{M^2-s_{12}}\,;1\right)-12 H\left(0,\frac{M^2}{M^2-s_{23}}\,;1\right)+6 \log (-s_{12}) \log \left(s_{23} M^{-2}\right)+6 \log (-s_{23}) \log \left(s_{12} M^{-2}\right)+3 \log ^2\left(s_{12} M^{-2}\right)+3 \log ^2\left(s_{23} M^{-2}\right)-24 \zeta(2)-3 \log ^2\left(\frac{s_{23}}{s_{12}}\right)+6 \log (-s_{23}) \log \left(\frac{s_{23}}{s_{12}}\right)+6 \log ^2(-s_{12})+\pi ^2}{6 s_{12} s_{23}}+O\left(\varepsilon^1\right)
Results.normalizedSymbolTeX: \begin{aligned}\varepsilon^{-1}&\colon\;\frac{2}{s_{12} s_{23}}\!\left[-(W_1) - (W_2)\right] \\ \varepsilon^{0}&\colon\;\frac{2}{s_{12} s_{23}}\!\left[-(W_3 \otimes W_1) - (W_4 \otimes W_2) + (W_1 \otimes W_1) + (W_1 \otimes W_2) + (W_2 \otimes W_1) + (W_2 \otimes W_2)\right]\end{aligned}

Names: massless 1-loop box with one off-shell leg
quadruple: {E^(eps*EulerGamma)*Gamma[2 + eps], (x1 + x2 + x3 + x4)^(2*eps)*(s12*x2*x3 + MM*x1*x4 - s12*x1*x4 - s23*x1*x4 + MM*x2*x4)^(-2 - eps), {x1, x2, x3, x4}, {MM, s12, s23}}
